category_sources: source_facts.description says it manages /etc/hosts; official GitHub README describes hostess as an idempotent command-line utility for managing /etc/hosts.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hostess; official GitHub repository title and README use “hostess”.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation and usage sections; no separate official docs site found in supplied facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/cbednarski/hostess; repo not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI for hosts-file management; official README says it is used for development, testing, debugging, and DNS-related hosts-file workflows.
